input.initialUserPrompt: I need to update the CORS settings in the FastApi application. Specifically, I need to modify the `main.py` file in the `bridge` directory to ensure that `allow_credentials` is set to `True` for `CORS` middleware.

value.name: Inform user about aiohttp instead of FastAPI
Add CORS middleware to aiohttp application in bridge/harvester.py
Set allow_credentials to True for CORS in bridge/harvester.py

output.value:
FROM python:3.12-slim
ARG APP_VERSION=dev
ENV APP_VERSION=${APP_VERSION}
LABEL org.opencontainers.image.version=${APP_VERSION}

COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /usr/local/bin/uv

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ffmpeg \
    xvfb \
    libnss3 libnspr4 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 \
    libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 \
    libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2 libpango-1.0-0 libcairo2 \
    libatspi2.0-0 libx11-6 libxext6 libxcb1 \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

COPY requirements.txt .
RUN uv pip install --system --no-cache -r requirements.txt && \
    python -m playwright install chromium

COPY harvester.py .
COPY rss_transformer.py .
COPY main.py .

CMD ["python", "main.py"]
